nasb.text: Turn to me and be gracious to me, After Your manner with those who love Your name.

esv.text: Turn to me and be gracious to me, as is your way with those who love your name.

cnv.text: 求你轉向我，恩待我； 像你素常對待那些愛你名的人那樣。

ccb.text: 求你眷顾我、怜悯我， 像你素来恩待那些爱你的人一样。

csbs.text: 求你转向我、恩待我， 就像你素常对待那些爱你名的人。
